nasb.text: Then Jonathan called David, and Jonathan told him all these words. And Jonathan brought David to Saul, and he was in his presence as formerly.

esv.text: And Jonathan called David, and Jonathan reported to him all these things. And Jonathan brought David to Saul, and he was in his presence as before.

cnv.text: 約拿單叫大衛來，把這一切話都告訴他；約拿單把大衛帶到掃羅那裡，他就像以前一樣，侍候在掃羅面前。

ccb.text: 约拿单叫来大卫，把经过告诉他，带他去见扫罗，大卫又像以前一样伺候扫罗。
